name: code-read
description: Find Python function/class definitions by name or regex and read their full body, collapsing grep-for-line-number + sed-range into one step.

parameters.name: --name
parameters.description: Function or class name to find (searches def/class definitions)

parameters.name: --pattern
parameters.description: Custom regex pattern to match definition lines

parameters.name: --tail
parameters.description: Show last N output lines instead of first N

parameters.name: --context
parameters.description: Decorator/comment lines before definition to include

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: One or more Python files to search (default: all *.py recursively)

examples.expected: Full body of create_mailbox() function from def line to next def/class

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses grep -n for definition + sed/batch-read for body range into one step, saving 1-2 agent steps per code exploration.
